description: 52M, newly diagnosed T2DM, A1C 7.8%, no CVD, no CKD, eGFR 85. Metformin first-line (R1). Statin for diabetes (R5, moderate-intensity). Not on metformin yet so R4 (intensification) does not fire.

actions.label: Initiate metformin therapy
actions.rationale: ADA-A: Metformin is the preferred initial pharmacologic agent for T2DM. Patient is newly diagnosed, not on any glucose-lowering therapy. eGFR 85 is well above the contraindication threshold of 30.

actions.label: Initiate moderate-intensity statin therapy
actions.rationale: ADA-A: All adults aged 40-75 with diabetes should receive at least moderate-intensity statin regardless of ASCVD risk score. Patient is 52, diabetic, statin-naive.

contraindications.label: Defer metformin in favor of lifestyle modifications alone
contraindications.rationale: ADA-A recommends pharmacologic therapy (metformin) at diagnosis of T2DM. Lifestyle alone is not first-line per current guidelines.
